description: Roberto Carlos, a 68-year-old retired pipefitter, presents for his annual OSHA-mandated asbestos medical surveillance exam. As the Occupational Health Physician, complete his surveillance protocol in GNU Health. Record an active diagnosis of Pleural Plaque or Pneumoconiosis for Roberto Carlos, log his Respiratory Rate and Oxygen Saturation (SpO2) in a clinical evaluation, order a baseline cardiopulmonary lab test (e.g., CBC or ABG), update his lifestyle record to document his smoking/tobacco status, and schedule his next mandatory annual surveillance appointment for approximately one year from today. Login: admin / gnusolidario.
